title: carex × dufftii
intro: Carex × dufftii, also known as Duff's sedge, is a hybrid sedge plant belonging to the genus Carex, typically found in North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant compounds. The health benefits of Carex × dufftii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Carex × dufftii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
